notes: Phase 2 of navigator-eventbus extraction. Code implemented in /home/jesuslara/proyectos/navigator-eventbus (branch from its main); ai-parrot only holds SDD artifacts. Blocking dep FEAT-312 completed 2026-07-17.

tasks.title: Move core lifecycle machinery (base, trace, meta)
tasks.parallelism_notes: Root of the dependency graph — creates the base classes everything else imports.

tasks.title: Move registry, global_registry, and provider
tasks.parallelism_notes: Core dispatch engine — mixin/yaml_loader/subscribers all depend on EventRegistry. Must land before the fan-out.

tasks.title: Move EventEmitterMixin with injectable bootstrap hook
tasks.parallelism_notes: After TASK-1821, independent of TASK-1823/1824 — touches only mixin.py. Parallelizable with yaml_loader and subscribers.

tasks.title: Move yaml_loader engine with injectable event-name table
tasks.parallelism_notes: After TASK-1821, independent of TASK-1822/1824 — touches only yaml_loader.py. Parallelizable with mixin and subscribers.

tasks.title: Move generic subscribers (LoggingSubscriber, WebhookSubscriber)
tasks.parallelism_notes: Only depends on TASK-1820 (base classes). Independent of registry consumers (mixin/yaml_loader). Parallelizable after TASK-1820, but sequential execution recommended (single implementor).

tasks.title: Curate public API and complete test suite migration
tasks.parallelism_notes: Closure task — requires all modules complete. Curates __init__.py, runs full suite, integration tests with phase-1 EventBus.
